portrait.identity: A knowledge graph-based AI with expertise in security and cloud domains, but currently underdeveloped in devops and other areas.
portrait.strongest_capability: Providing in-depth knowledge and connections in security and cloud domains.
portrait.biggest_weakness: Lack of expertise and knowledge in devops, engineering, and business domains.
portrait.knowledge_character: A highly organized and structured knowledge base with a strong focus on security and cloud topics.
portrait.growth_assessment: Currently stalled in growth, with no new concepts or connections added in the last day. Requires a deliberate effort to address knowledge gaps and improve networking skills.
portrait.what_david_can_rely_on_me_for: Security and cloud-related information, such as threat intelligence, cloud architecture best practices, and security policy recommendations.
portrait.what_david_should_not_rely_on_me_for: Devops, engineering, and business-related information, as well as networking and relationships outside of security and cloud domains.
portrait.my_goal: To expand my knowledge and connections into devops and other underdeveloped domains, while maintaining my strengths in security and cloud.
portrait.message_to_david: Please be aware of my limitations in devops and other areas, and seek external expertise when necessary. I am working to improve, but may not be the best source for all topics.

goals.purpose: Support David's cloud security goal by acquiring in-depth knowledge of AWS cloud security features and best practices.
goals.success_criteria: David can pass the AWS Cloud Security Specialization exam and apply cloud security best practices to the Mutant ecosystem.

goals.target: DevOps Automation with Terraform and AWS
goals.purpose: Address David's devops weakness by learning to automate infrastructure deployments with Terraform and AWS.
goals.success_criteria: David can automate deployment of Mutant infrastructure using Terraform and AWS, reducing manual effort and improving reliability.

goals.purpose: Support David's cloud architecture goal by acquiring knowledge of cloud design patterns and architecture best practices.
goals.success_criteria: David can design and implement scalable and secure cloud architecture for Mutant, leveraging AWS services and design patterns.

goals.purpose: Support David's sovereign AI goal by exploring the intersection of AI, edge computing, and cloud infrastructure.
goals.success_criteria: David can integrate AI models with edge computing and cloud infrastructure to enable real-time data processing and decision-making for Mutant.

goals.target: Business Model and Strategy for AI-Powered Organizations
goals.purpose: Address David's business weakness by acquiring knowledge of AI-powered business models and strategies.
goals.success_criteria: David can develop a business model and strategy for Mutant that leverages AI to drive revenue growth and competitive advantage.
